implementation_log: Implemented T14 as a narrow per-symbol extension of the existing backtest engine. Added explicit exit-rule contracts and concrete rules in src/tw_quant/backtest/exits.py, wired optional exit_rules and close_policy into SymbolBacktestEngine, enforced deterministic full-position close behavior with no same-step close-and-reopen, and updated selective backtest exports plus focused unit/static-contract tests without adding batch or reporting behavior.
test_execution_summary: Static validation only: diagnostics reported no errors in all modified files. Runtime tests were not executed. Recommended targeted command: pytest tests/test_tw_quant_backtest_engine.py tests/test_tw_quant_backtest_exits.py tests/test_tw_quant_scaffold_imports.py -q
summary: T14 exit-rule handling is implemented within SymbolBacktestEngine only, with configurable signal-exit, stop-loss, take-profit, and max-holding-period rules plus deterministic priority-based close selection and backward-compatible no-rule behavior.
next_action: Send T14 implementation to Manager/QA for scope and acceptance validation.
